meaning: n.登高,上升adj.上坡的,向上的adv.上坡地,向上地
examples: He had been running uphill a long way.
She was hot and breathless from the exertion of cycling uphill.
He says the election is an uphill battle for him, but feels he is making headway.
The plan faces an uphill battle in the Senate, and the White House has promised to veto.
